attr.title: Crimsonland
attr.desc: A faithful rewrite of crimsonland 1.9.93 from 2003
attr.inst:
Place crimson.paq and sfx.paq in crimsonland/assets; music.paq or loose music/*.ogg files are optional. 

Controls
Left stick: movement
Right stick: aim/fire
Y: perk selection
L1/L2: reload
X: Backspace during high-score name entry
D-pad/buttons navigate menus and compact UI screens
